1891430.name: Meat Madness
1891430.description:
The year is 2104. Humanity is starving.
When the surface of the dwarf planet Ceres breaks apart revealing a planet-sized organism underneath, Earth began to feast upon its flesh.
The DSV-Provender, an IngestiCorp mining ship, has disappeared on a mission to Ceres. Play as Recovery Specialist John Stuart as you solve the mystery of the disaster that took place aboard the DSV-Provender by delving deep into the meat planet’s surface and discovering its dark secrets.
Gameplay combines precision platforming, exploration, and interactive dialog in a gritty PS1 style horror atmosphere.

Cover art by Theresa Baxter
1891430.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
